practice.name: Problem 5.3.3 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: How many 3-digit even numbers are there with distinct digits?

practice.name: Problem 5.3.20 (Mastering AMC 8)
practice.statement: Three unique fair tetrahedral die, whose faces are numbered 1, 2, 3, and 4 are rolled. How many ways can the sum of the numbers rolled be 7?
